focus_cards.name: Pitch Center
focus_cards.description: Focus on locking your ear onto the exact center of each pitch before and during playing.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Lock your ear onto the center of the pitch before you play.

prompts.listen: Listen for the exact center of the pitch. Not sharp, not flat—right in the middle.
prompts.sing: Sing the pitch and feel where it sits in the center.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine your instrument producing that centered pitch.

focus_cards.name: Pitch + Tone Together
focus_cards.description: Combine pitch accuracy with tone quality as a unified target.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Hear both the pitch center and the tone quality you want before playing.

prompts.listen: Notice how the tone color and pitch are intertwined in the model.
prompts.sing: Vocalize with both pitch accuracy and the tone character you want.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine your instrument with that exact pitch and tone together.

focus_cards.name: Pitch Snap
focus_cards.description: Focus on instantaneous pitch arrival—no scooping or searching.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Snap to the pitch immediately. No searching.

prompts.listen: Notice how the pitch arrives instantly without any sliding or searching.
prompts.sing: Sing each pitch with immediate arrival—no scooping up or down.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine your first note snapping perfectly into place.

focus_cards.name: Projection Intent
focus_cards.description: Focus on directing sound outward to a specific point in space.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Aim your sound at a point beyond the room.

prompts.listen: Notice how the sound seems to travel and fill space.
prompts.sing: Sing as if sending your voice to the back wall.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine your sound traveling to a specific point in the distance.

focus_cards.name: Resonant Ring
focus_cards.description: Focus on the natural overtones and ring in your sound.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Listen for the ring in your sound—the overtones that bloom after the attack.

prompts.listen: Notice the overtones that continue after the initial attack.
prompts.sing: Let your voice resonate and bloom after each onset.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine your tone ringing with rich overtones.

focus_cards.name: Core Sound
focus_cards.description: Focus on the fundamental, centered tone at the heart of your sound.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Find the core—the centered, fundamental tone.

prompts.listen: Notice the centered, fundamental tone quality.
prompts.sing: Produce a tone with a strong, clear center.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine a solid core to every note you play.

focus_cards.name: Soft with Carry
focus_cards.description: Play softly while maintaining projection and presence.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Play soft but let the sound still travel.

prompts.listen: Notice how soft playing can still have presence and carry.
prompts.sing: Sing quietly but with forward placement.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine a soft sound that still reaches the back of the hall.

focus_cards.name: Projected without Push
focus_cards.description: Project sound using resonance rather than force.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Project through resonance, not through pushing.

prompts.listen: Notice projection that comes from resonance rather than force.
prompts.sing: Project your voice without tension or pushing.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine full projection with completely relaxed effort.

focus_cards.name: Stable Center Through Change
focus_cards.description: Maintain consistent tone quality across register and dynamic changes.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Keep your core tone stable even as other things change.

prompts.listen: Notice how the core tone stays consistent through changes.
prompts.sing: Maintain your tone quality while changing pitch or volume.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine the same fundamental tone through every note.

focus_cards.name: Subdivision
focus_cards.description: Feel the smallest rhythmic unit underlying the music.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Feel the subdivision—the smallest pulse within the beat.

prompts.listen: Notice the underlying subdivision that holds everything together.
prompts.sing: Tap or vocalize the subdivision while singing the melody.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine each note placed precisely within the subdivision grid.

focus_cards.name: Internal Pulse
focus_cards.description: Maintain a steady internal sense of time independent of external sounds.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Feel the pulse inside you—steady and independent.

prompts.listen: Internalize the tempo so completely it feels like your heartbeat.
prompts.sing: Maintain rock-solid time from within.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine playing with perfect internal time, no metronome needed.

focus_cards.name: Rhythm Locks Pitch
focus_cards.description: Use rhythmic precision to support pitch accuracy.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Let perfect rhythm create perfect pitch placement.

prompts.listen: Notice how rhythmic precision supports pitch accuracy.
prompts.sing: Use exact rhythm to place each pitch precisely.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine rhythm and pitch as one unified target.

focus_cards.name: Speech-Like Time
focus_cards.description: Play with the natural rhythmic ebb and flow of speech.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Let the rhythm breathe like natural speech.

prompts.listen: Notice how the rhythm rises and falls like speech.
prompts.sing: Let your phrasing have the natural timing of speaking.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine playing as if telling a story.

focus_cards.name: Time First
focus_cards.description: Establish time before adding any other musical elements.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Set the time before you play a note.

prompts.listen: Notice how strong time sense underlies everything.
prompts.sing: Establish the pulse before adding the melody.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine the time already moving before you enter.

focus_cards.name: Clean Front
focus_cards.description: Focus on clear, precise note beginnings.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Every note starts with a clean, clear attack.

prompts.listen: Notice how each note begins with clarity.
prompts.sing: Start each note with a precise, clean onset.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine every attack perfectly clear.

focus_cards.name: Rhythmic Communication
focus_cards.description: Use articulation to communicate rhythmic intention.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Your articulation tells the rhythm story.

prompts.listen: Notice how articulation choices communicate rhythmic character.
prompts.sing: Use your consonants and vowels to express rhythm.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine your articulation speaking the rhythm.

focus_cards.name: Instant Switch Connection
focus_cards.description: Connect different articulations seamlessly without hesitation.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Switch articulation styles instantly without breaking flow.

prompts.listen: Notice smooth transitions between articulation types.
prompts.sing: Practice switching from legato to staccato instantly.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine flowing between articulations effortlessly.

focus_cards.name: Attack Matches Style
focus_cards.description: Choose attack styles that match the musical context.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Match your attack to the musical character.

prompts.listen: Notice how attack style reflects musical character.
prompts.sing: Vary your attack to match the mood of each phrase.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine the perfect attack for each musical moment.

focus_cards.name: Clean Ends
focus_cards.description: Focus on precise, intentional note endings.
focus_cards.attention_cue: End every note with intention and clarity.

prompts.listen: Notice how notes end—tapered? Cut off? Sustained?
prompts.sing: Give each note a deliberate ending.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine controlling exactly when and how each note ends.

focus_cards.name: Rhythmic Edges
focus_cards.description: Create clear rhythmic definition through precise note boundaries.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Define the rhythm with clear edges on every note.

prompts.listen: Notice how clear note boundaries create rhythmic clarity.
prompts.sing: Give each note precise boundaries.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine each note with perfectly defined edges.

focus_cards.name: No Extra Movement
focus_cards.description: Eliminate unnecessary physical tension and movement.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Use only the movement you need. Nothing extra.

prompts.listen: Imagine the sound being produced with minimal effort.
prompts.sing: Sing with only the effort needed—nothing more.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine playing with perfect efficiency.

focus_cards.name: Free Air
focus_cards.description: Allow breath to flow freely without restriction.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Let the air flow freely—no holding, no forcing.

prompts.listen: Notice sound produced with free, unrestricted air.
prompts.sing: Sing with completely free airflow.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine air moving through your instrument without any obstruction.

focus_cards.name: Even Changes
focus_cards.description: Make musical changes (register, dynamic, etc.) smoothly and evenly.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Every change is smooth and even—no bumps or jolts.

prompts.listen: Notice how changes happen smoothly without disruption.
prompts.sing: Make every change gradual and controlled.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine all transitions perfectly smooth.

focus_cards.name: Minimum Pressure
focus_cards.description: Use the minimum physical pressure needed to produce the sound.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Only as much pressure as you need—not a gram more.

prompts.listen: Imagine sound produced with the lightest possible touch.
prompts.sing: Produce tone with minimal effort.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine playing with the lightest pressure that still works.

focus_cards.name: Phrase Direction
focus_cards.description: Every phrase has direction—moving toward or away from a point.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Know where the phrase is going. Every phrase has direction.

prompts.listen: Notice the forward motion and goal of each phrase.
prompts.sing: Give each phrase a clear sense of direction.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine your phrase as an arrow with a target.

focus_cards.name: Forward Rest
focus_cards.description: Rests have forward momentum—they don't stop the music.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Rests keep moving forward. They're active, not passive.

prompts.listen: Notice how rests maintain musical momentum.
prompts.sing: Feel the rest as active anticipation.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine rests as springboards to the next phrase.

focus_cards.name: Continuous Tension
focus_cards.description: Maintain musical tension and engagement throughout a passage.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Keep the musical tension alive from start to finish.

prompts.listen: Notice how musical tension is sustained throughout.
prompts.sing: Keep every moment engaged with musical intention.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine an unbroken thread of musical energy.

focus_cards.name: Line Over Notes
focus_cards.description: Think horizontally—the line matters more than individual notes.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Hear the line, not just the notes. Connect everything.

prompts.listen: Notice the overarching line rather than individual notes.
prompts.sing: Sing the phrase as one continuous line.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine drawing a single unbroken line through the music.

focus_cards.name: Confident Silence
focus_cards.description: Use silence with intention and confidence.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Own the silence. It's part of the music.

prompts.listen: Notice how silence is used as a musical element.
prompts.sing: Use silence as deliberately as sound.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine silence as a powerful musical statement.

focus_cards.name: Phrase Targets
focus_cards.description: Identify and move toward the peak or goal of each phrase.
focus_cards.attention_cue: Find the target of each phrase and shape toward it.

prompts.listen: Notice where each phrase reaches its peak or goal.
prompts.sing: Shape every phrase toward its target note or moment.
prompts.imagine_instrument: Imagine each phrase as an arc with a clear destination.
